phone.label: Nhamba dzenhare
phone.searchCountry: Tsvaga nyika, kodhi, kana chivakashure chekufona
phone.invalid: Isa nhamba dzenhare dzinoshanda kunyika yawasarudza.

auth.onboardingTagline: Mufambidzani wekuchengetedza pachedu wenguva dziri pakati pekuti “Ndakanaka” uye “Ndinoda rubatsiro.”
auth.createSubtitle: Sarudza nzira yekupinda kuti uchengetedze girafu rako rekuchengetedza.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Hatina kukwanisa kupedzisa kusaina. Tarisa uone kubatana kwako woedza zvakare.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kushandisa chirongwa chebudiriro munharaunda. Native Google Saina-In inoshanda mukuvaka kuvaka.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Batanidza izvozvi kana kuenderera wowedzera gare gare.
auth.northStarBody: Iyo VL01 inopfekwa inogona kukonzeresa kuyerera kwekuchengetedza nematepi uye ma gestures ekudzvanya kwenguva refu.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Mufambidzani wako akapfava pamepu uye mukufona.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear inogona kubatsira nemaitiro epamba, muchengeti, mamiriro echimbichimbi, nhare dzekukumbira, uye kutsigira nenzwi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Inoshandiswa semepu, nzvimbo dzine njodzi, kusvika kwakachengeteka, uye SOS mamiriro.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving inokumbira nzvimbo kuitira kuti vachengeti vanzwisise panodiwa rubatsiro. Unogona kushandura izvi pave paya muZvirongwa.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Zviziviso zvinotsigira kutarisa-mukati uye zviitiko zvekukurumidzira.
permissions.notificationsBody: Tinongoshandisa zviziviso zvekuchengetedza kuchengetedza, zvigadziriso zvechimbichimbi, uye zviyeuchidzo zvaunogonesa.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving inoshandisa nzvimbo yako semepu yekuchengetedza, nzvimbo dzine njodzi, nekukurumidza kugovana, uye SOS mamiriro. Unogona kushandura izvi pave paya muZvirongwa.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving inotumira zviyeuchidzo zvekupinda, zvigadziriso zvechimbichimbi, uye zvekuchengetedza zvaunogonesa. Isu hatishandise zviziviso kune ads.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving inoshandisa maikorofoni yako chete paunotanga AI mufambidzani kana runhare rwekuchengetedza.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving inoshandisa Bluetooth kubatanidza neNorthStar jewelry, kuverenga mamiriro ekubatanidza, uye kukonzeresa kuyerera kwekuchengetedza kubva kune zvinopfeka.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving inoshandisa kamera chete kana wasarudza kutora mufananidzo kana kugovera chengetedzo mufananidzo.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving inochengetedza kuyerera uku kunowanikwa kubva kuSettings uye dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Sarudza izwi reshamwari rinonzwa rakachengetedzeka kuti rinzwe.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Govera mamiriro ezvinhu nevanhu vaunovimba navo.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Mapopi mashanu anogona kukwira kusvika paSOS uye chenjedzo.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Gadzira chikonzero chakanaka chekusiya mamiriro asina kugadzikana.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tanga chaiyo-nguva yekufambidzana kufona kana iwe uchida rutsigiro.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Edza kuchengetedzwa kunoyerera mune yakaderera-kudzvanywa demo.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Chengeta zvishongo zviri pedyo paunenge uchitarisa.
jewelry.noDevices: Hapana pari pedyo NorthStar zvishandiso zvawanikwa.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning yatadza kutanga. Ndapota edza zvakare.
jewelry.scanFailed: Hatina kuwana zvishongo zviri pedyo. Tarisa Bluetooth, chengeta NorthStar pedyo, woedza zvakare.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanner yatadza kutanga. Tarisa Bluetooth kuwana woedza zvakare.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Kusvika pamudziyo uri pedyo wakadzimwa. Bvumira Bluetooth kupinda mumaSettings, woedza zvakare.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar yakatora nguva yakareba kuti ibatane. Iswededze pedyo woedza zvakare.
jewelry.connectFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kubatana neNorthStar. Tarisa kuti yakachajiwa uye kuti iri pedyo here, woedza zvakare.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Chengeta NorthStar yakachajwa uye pedyo nenhare iyi, wozoongorora zvakare.

home.subtitle: Safety companion dashboard
home.readyBody: Izwi, mepu, zvishongo, uye vachengeti zvinongotorwa nekupombi imwe chete.

map.title: Mepu yekuchengetedza
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox inopa mune yekuvandudza kuvaka.
map.updateFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kugadzirisa nzvimbo yako. Ndapota edza zvakare.
map.notRequested: Kupinda kwenzvimbo hakuna kukumbirwa. Unogona kuigonesa gare gare kubva kuSettings.
map.permissionOff: Kupinda panzvimbo kwakadzimwa. Ibatise mumaSettings kuti pakati pemepu yekuchengetedza pauri.
map.timeout: Nzvimbo yako iri kutora nguva yakareba kupfuura yaitarisirwa. Enda kune imwe nzvimbo nechiratidzo chakajeka uye edza zvakare.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Nzvimbo dzaunovimba nadzo dzaunochengeta dzichaonekwa pano kuti uwane nekukurumidza.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tanga kufona kana kunyora meseji kana wagadzirira.

history.clearMessage: Izvi zvinobvisa AI mameseji eshamwari akachengetedzwa kubva pachigadzirwa ichi.
history.title: Nhoroondo yenhaurirano
history.subtitle: AI mameseji eshamwari akachengetwa pamudziyo uyu.
history.emptyMessage: Nhaurirano dzako dzeAI dzichaonekwa pano mushure mekufona kwekutanga.
history.loadFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kuburitsa nhoroondo yenhaurirano. Ndapota edza zvakare.
history.clearFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kujekesa nhoroondo yenhaurirano. Ndapota edza zvakare.
history.deleteFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kudzima nhaurirano iyoyo. Ndapota edza zvakare.

voices.title: Manzwi angu ekuchengetedza anofona
voices.subtitle: Sarudza izwi reshamwari rinonzwa rakakodzera kunzwa.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Iri izwi rakatadza kuridzwa. Ndapota edza zvakare.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Shandisa mhinduro dzakaunganidzwa kana network kana Hume zvisipo.
settings.privacyBody: Tumira kunze kana kudzima data remunharaunda rakachengetwa pachigadzirwa ichi.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Haukwanisi kutumira data rako kunze izvozvi.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Izvi zvinobvisa chimiro chako, marongero, vaunosangana navo nechimbichimbi, nhoroondo yenhaurirano, zviyeuchidzo zvemvumo, uye chikamu chevanyori vemunharaunda kubva pachigadzirwa ichi.

sections.privacySubtitle: Nhoroondo, kutumira kunze kwenyika, kudzima, uye mutemo

settings.updateFailedMessage: Hatina kukwanisa kuchengetedza sarudzo iyoyo. Ndapota edza zvakare.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Chirongwa chako chichiri kushanda. Ndapota edza zvakare.

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.subtitle: Vanhu vanovimbwa varipo panguva yekuchengetedzwa kuyerera.
contacts.name: Zita
contacts.emptyMessage: Wedzera munhu waunovimba naye kuti agadzirire kana kuyerera kwekuchengeteka kuchida iye.
contacts.removeMessage: Munhu uyu haachaoneka mukuyerera kwako kwechimbichimbi.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Hatina kukwanisa kuchengetedza munhu uyu. Tarisa zvese uye edza zvakare.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Hatina kukwanisa kubvisa munhu uyu. Ndapota edza zvakare.

friends.title: Shamwari
friends.subtitle: Vachengeti, zvikumbiro, uye girafu rekukurumidzira.
friends.emptyMessage: Shamwari dzinovimbwa nevachengeti vachaonekwa pano kana vawedzerwa.

emergency.title: Chimbichimbi SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kukwidza chete kana uchida rubatsiro rwekukurumidza.
emergency.body: Izvi zvinozivisa mafambiro ako ekuchengetedza uye kugadzirira vanokufonera nechimbichimbi.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub yekugovera nzvimbo yagadzirira. Batanidza iyo backend share endpoint kuti utumire live link.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Tokonya kaviri NorthStar yako kuti udonhedze orenji yekuchengetedza.
capybearTap.body: Gesture nzira yakagadzirira BLE chiitiko wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Unoita seusina Indaneti. Meseji yako ichatumirwa kana wabatanidza zvakare.
errors.voiceQueued: Mharidzo yachengetwa. Ichatumirwa kana izwi rinofambidzana richibatanidza zvakare.
errors.microphone: Kuwana maikorofoni kunodiwa pakufona kwezwi. Unogona kuigonesa muZvirongwa, kana kunyora meseji panzvimbo.
errors.billing: Izwi repamhepo rinofambidzana naye parizvino harisi kuwanikwa. Unogona kuenderera mberi neshamwari isina Indaneti.
errors.authentication: Izwi raaperekedza haana kukwanisa kuongorora chirongwa ichi. Pinda zvakare kana kushandisa shamwari isina Indaneti parizvino.
errors.timeout: Izwi rinofambidzana naye rakatora nguva yakareba kuti ridaire. Tarisa uone kubatana kwako woedza zvakare.
errors.network: Hatina kukwanisa kusvika padivi peizwi. Tarisa uone kubatana kwako, woedza zvakare kana kuenderera mberi pasina Indaneti.
errors.genericVoice: Pane chimwe chinhu chakanganisa kufona kwezwi. Edza zvakare, kana kuenderera mberi neshamwari isina Indaneti.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving inoda kuwana maikorofoni kuti ive kuchengeteka uye AI nhare dzinofambidzana.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving inoshandisa nzvimbo yako semepu yekuchengetedza uye maficha ari pedyo.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving inoshandisa Bluetooth kubatanidza kune NorthStar yako zvishongo zvekuchengetedza.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Nzira iyi yekupinda nayo haisi kuwanikwa mushanduro iyi.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo mode inoshandisa mashoko ekunyepedzera akachengetwa pamudziyo chete. Masevhisi akabatana haana kusimbiswa, uye chikamu chino chinotangazve kana app yavhurwazve.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kodhi yekusimbisa haisi kushanda kana kuti yapera nguva. Kumbira kodhi itsva woedzazve.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Waedza kupinda kakawanda. Mira kwechinguva, woedzazve.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Kusimbisa kupinda kwatora nguva yakareba. Tarisa kubatana kwako woedzazve.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Hatina kukwanisa kubatana nesevhisi yekupinda. Tarisa kubatana kwako woedzazve.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Chikamu chako chapera nguva. Pinda zvakare.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Mepu yekuchengeteka haina kukwanisa kuvhurwa. Tarisa kubatana kwako woedzazve.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Nzvimbo yauri parizvino haisi kuwanikwa. Tiri kuratidza nzvimbo yako yekupedzisira yakachengetwa kubva pa %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kugovera nzvimbo yako. Tarisa mvumo yekuwana nzvimbo woedzazve.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Iyi ndiyo nzvimbo yangu yakanyorwa pa %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Iyi ndiyo nzvimbo yangu yekupedzisira yakachengetwa, yakanyorwa pa %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Mvumo yeBluetooth yakadzimwa. Ibatidze muSettings, woedzazve.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kubatanidza neBluetooth hakusi kuwanikwa pamudziyo uyu kana mushanduro iyi.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kuwana NorthStar. Ichengete iri pedyo, tarisa Bluetooth, woedzazve.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Hapana midziyo yeNorthStar iri pedyo yawanikwa. Ichengete iri pedyo wotsvagazve.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kubatana neNorthStar. Ichengete iine chaji uye iri pedyo, woedzazve.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kuchengetedza nzvimbo iyi. Edzazve.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Hapana munhu wekufonera panjodzi aivapo; hapana kufona kwakaitwa.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Pekufonera parunhare hapana kukwanisa kuvhurwa; hapana kufona kwakaitwa.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Kuedza kwekupedzisira kweSOS hakuna kukwanisa kusimbiswa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Mubatsiri wezwi haasi kuwanikwa parizvino. Edzazve gare gare kana kuti enderera nemubatsiri anoshanda pasina internet.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
